title: Home
questions: What was your first home like?
How many times have you moved in your life? How do you feel about moving?
Have you ever built a house? Would you like to build your own home?
Have you ever slept in the open? What was it like?
What is your perfect accommodation?
Have you ever had a wonderful neighbour? How was he/she good?
What are good ways of resolving disputes with not so good neighbours?
Where do you prefer living, in the city, or in the countryside? Why?
How much space do you need to live in? Explain why?
Should the state provide accommodation for homeless people? Why/Why not?
What things make a house a home?
How important is having a garden to you?
Which is the most important room for you in your house? Why?
Is it better to rent or to buy your own accommodation? Why?
Is buying houses and apartments for renting out a good investment?
Some of the super rich live in floating tax havens to avoid paying any tax. Would you consider doing this if you were a millionaire?
Would you like to spend a weekend in an igloo? Why/Why not?
Have you ever shared your accommodation with the natural world [insects and animals]? What did you do?
Would you prefer to live in an old house or a new house? Why?
What type of holiday accommodation do you like best? Why?
Is it better to rent or buy? Why?
What do you consider when choosing where to live?
What do you like/dislike about where you live now?
Can you describe your dream home?
